auth.slogan: The Unified Hub for MCP Servers
auth.subtitle: Centralized management platform for Model Context Protocol servers. Organize, monitor, and scale multiple MCP servers with flexible routing strategies.
auth.socialLoginFailed: Social login failed. Please try again.
auth.error.account_not_linked: Account not linked. Your email may not be verified by the identity provider. Please verify your email and try again.
auth.error.email_doesn't_match: The email from the identity provider does not match your existing account.
auth.error.email_not_found: No email was returned by the identity provider.
auth.error.access_denied: Access was denied by the identity provider.
auth.error.account_already_linked_to_differen: This account is already linked to a different user.
auth.error.unable_to_link_account: Unable to link the account. Please try again.
auth.error.invalid_code: Invalid authorization code. Please try again.
auth.error.unable_to_get_user_info: Unable to get user information from the identity provider.
auth.emptyFields: Username and password cannot be empty
auth.loginFailed: Login failed, please check your username and password
auth.serverUnavailable: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your network connection or try again later
auth.passwordsNotMatch: New password and confirmation do not match
auth.defaultPasswordMessage: You are using the default password (admin123), which poses a security risk. Please change your password immediately to protect your account.
auth.passwordStrengthError: Password does not meet security requirements
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
auth.passwordRequireLetter: Password must contain at least one letter
auth.passwordRequireNumber: Password must contain at least one number
auth.passwordRequireSpecial: Password must contain at least one special character
auth.passwordStrengthHint: Password must be at least 8 characters and contain letters, numbers, and special characters

server.invalidConfig: Could not find configuration data for {{serverName}}
server.mcpApp: MCP App — this server exposes interactive UI resources
server.visibilityPrivate: Private — only the owner and admins
server.visibilityDescription: Controls which non-admin users see this server in tools/list. Admins always see all servers regardless of this setting.
server.reinstallConfirm: This will clear the package cache and re-download dependencies. The server will restart.
server.disconnectOAuthConfirm: This will revoke stored OAuth credentials where supported and require authorization again.
server.disconnectOAuthError: Failed to disconnect OAuth for server {{serverName}}
server.timeoutDescription: Timeout for requests to the MCP server (ms)
server.maxTotalTimeoutDescription: Maximum total timeout for requests sent to the MCP server (ms) (Use with progress notifications)
server.resetTimeoutOnProgressDescription: Reset timeout on progress notifications (enabled by default)
server.enableKeepAlive: Enable Health Checks and Auto Reconnect
server.keepAliveDescription: Run periodic health checks and automatically reconnect this remote server when it becomes disconnected.
server.keepAliveIntervalDescription: Time between health checks and automatic reconnect attempts in milliseconds (default: 60000ms = 1 minute)
server.variablesDetected: Variables detected in configuration. Please confirm these variables are properly configured:
server.confirmVariablesMessage: Please ensure these variables are properly defined in your runtime environment. Continue adding server?

settings.subtitle: Configure system settings, authentication, routing, and MCP server integrations.
settings.enableGlobalRouteDescription: Allow connections to /sse endpoint without specifying a group ID
settings.enableGroupNameRouteDescription: Allow connections to /sse endpoint using group names instead of just group IDs
settings.enableBearerAuthDescription: Require bearer token authentication for MCP endpoints (default on)
settings.bearerAuthKeyDescription: The authentication key that will be required in the Bearer token
settings.bearerAuthHeaderNameDescription: Header name used to receive MCP bearer credentials. Change this when upstream passthrough headers also use Authorization.
settings.bearerKeysSectionDescription: Manage multiple keys with different access scopes.
settings.bearerKeyShownOnce: Copy this token now. It will not be shown again.
settings.deleteBearerKeyConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this key?
settings.selectAtLeastOneGroup: Please select at least one group
settings.selectAtLeastOneServer: Please select at least one server
settings.skipAuthDescription: Allow dashboard access without login; unauthenticated users get guest admin access (does not affect MCP endpoint auth)
settings.jsonBodyLimitDescription: Express JSON request size limit. This affects large OpenAPI schema uploads as well.
settings.pythonIndexUrlDescription: Set UV_DEFAULT_INDEX environment variable for Python package installation
settings.npmRegistryDescription: Set npm_config_registry environment variable for NPM package installation
settings.baseUrlDescription: Base URL for MCP requests and OAuth callbacks
settings.clearCacheDescription: Clear npm and uv package caches. Servers may need to re-download packages on next start.
settings.clearCacheConfirm: This will clear the npm and uv package caches. Servers may need to re-download packages on next start.
settings.exposeHttpDescription: When enabled, MCP services will be exposed to external clients via HTTP
settings.httpPortDescription: MCP HTTP service listening port, restart required after changes
settings.httpPortWarning: After changing the port, you need to restart the application for changes to take effect
settings.nodeVersionDescription: Select or install a specific Node.js version for running MCP servers
settings.pythonVersionDescription: Select or install a specific Python version for running MCP servers
settings.runtimeBrokenWarning: Version {{version}} is not fully installed. Consider reinstalling.
settings.runtimeReinstallTip: Force reinstall the currently selected version
settings.betterAuthEnvNote: Client IDs and secrets still come from environment variables. Changing Better Auth settings may require an application restart, and the install base URL origin is trusted automatically.
settings.enableBetterAuthDescription: Enable social and OIDC login when the required environment variables are configured.
settings.betterAuthBasePathDescription: Relative API path used by the Better Auth routes.
settings.betterAuthTrustedOriginsDescription: Comma-separated origins allowed for Better Auth requests. The install base URL origin is added automatically.
settings.betterAuthProvidersDescription: Provider switches control which configured login methods are exposed on the sign-in page.
settings.betterAuthOidcDescription: Requires OIDC client credentials plus a discovery URL.
settings.betterAuthOidcProviderIdDescription: Provider identifier used when starting the OIDC login flow.
settings.betterAuthOidcDiscoveryUrlDescription: Well-known OpenID configuration URL published by your identity provider.
settings.betterAuthOidcScopesDescription: Comma-separated scopes requested during the OIDC sign-in flow.
settings.betterAuthOidcPromptDescription: Optional prompt value sent to the identity provider, such as login or consent.
settings.betterAuthOidcPkceDescription: Use PKCE for the OIDC authorization flow.
settings.enableSmartRoutingDescription: Enable smart routing feature to search the most suitable tool based on input (using $smart group name)
settings.basePacingDelayMsDescription: Baseline delay between embedding API requests. Defaults to 0 — the system manages rate limits automatically: it respects Retry-After headers, falls back to a 63-second cooldown, and increases the pacing delay after any 403/429 response. Set a non-zero value only if your provider enforces a fixed minimum interval between requests.
settings.basePacingDelayMsAuto: Default ({{value}} ms): rate limiting is managed automatically.
settings.basePacingDelayMsZero: 0 ms (default): rate limiting is managed automatically via adaptive throttling and retry logic.
settings.basePacingDelayMsOverride: Custom value: overrides the default baseline pacing delay.
settings.embeddingEncodingFormatDescription: Encoding format for embedding vectors. Auto will detect based on provider support.
settings.azureOpenaiEmbeddingModelDescription: The actual OpenAI model name deployed in Azure (e.g. text-embedding-3-small). Used for accurate token counting before sending text to the API.
settings.progressiveDisclosureDescription: When enabled, search_tools returns only tool names and descriptions. Use describe_tool to get full parameter schema, reducing token usage.
settings.embeddingMaxTokensDescription: Maximum tokens for text truncation before generating embeddings. Leave empty to use the model default automatically. A custom value always overrides the model default. Manually setting this value is especially useful when using local LLM providers to prevent truncation errors.
settings.embeddingMaxTokensOverride: This value overrides the model default.
settings.smartRoutingRequiredFields: Database URL is required to enable smart routing. An LLM Provider API Key is required for cloud-based providers (local LLMs usually don't require an API key, enter any value to pass the form validation)
settings.smartRoutingValidationError: Please fill in the required fields before enabling Smart Routing: {{fields}}
settings.smartRoutingWorkflowDescription: Prompts are vectorized; top-k similar tools are fetched from pgvector and exposed to the upstream LLM.
settings.toolResultCompressionDescription: Reduce large text tool outputs before they reach MCP clients. Changes apply to the next tool call.
settings.toolResultCompressionStrategyDescription: Auto detects JSON, logs, search output, diffs, and plain text.
settings.toolResultCompressionMinTokensDescriptio: Only compress text blocks at or above this size.
settings.toolResultCompressionMaxOutputTokensDesc: Target maximum tokens for each compressed text block.
settings.mcpRouterApiKeyDescription: API key for accessing MCPRouter cloud market services
settings.mcpRouterRefererDescription: Referer header for MCPRouter API requests
settings.mcpRouterTitleDescription: Title header for MCPRouter API requests
settings.nameSeparatorDescription: Character used to separate server name and tool/prompt name (default: -)
settings.enableSessionRebuildDescription: When enabled, applies the improved server session rebuild code for better session management experience
settings.storeToolPayloadDescription: When enabled, the full input and output of each tool call is stored in activity logs. Tool payloads are saved verbatim without redaction; turn this off if tool arguments may contain sensitive data and should not be persisted.
settings.storeToolPayloadUpdateFailed: Failed to update tool payload storage setting
settings.restartRequired: Configuration saved. It is recommended to restart the application to ensure all services load the new settings correctly.
settings.mcpSettingsJsonDescription: View, copy, or download your current mcp_settings.json configuration for backup or migration to other tools
settings.enableOauthServerDescription: Allow MCPHub to issue OAuth tokens for external clients
settings.requireClientSecretDescription: When enabled, confidential clients must present a client secret (disable for PKCE-only clients)
settings.requireStateDescription: Reject authorization requests that omit the OAuth state parameter
settings.accessTokenLifetimeDescription: How long issued access tokens remain valid
settings.refreshTokenLifetimeDescription: How long refresh tokens remain valid
settings.authorizationCodeLifetimeDescription: How long authorization codes remain valid before they can be exchanged
settings.allowedScopesDescription: Comma-separated list of scopes users can approve during authorization
settings.dynamicRegistrationDescription: Allow RFC 7591 compliant clients to self-register using the public endpoint
settings.dynamicRegistrationAllowedGrantTypesDesc: Comma-separated list of grants permitted for dynamically registered clients
settings.dynamicRegistrationAuthDescription: Protect the registration endpoint so only authenticated requests can register clients
settings.invalidNumberInput: Please enter a valid non-negative number
